### Dieharder
This product includes dieharder (Copyright Robert G. Brown).  
Dieharder is licensed under the GNU General Public License v2 or later (GPL).  
The source code for the dieharder binary is included unmodified in this package under `third_party/src/dieharder/`, and the dieharder executable was built from the original sources.  
Our software calls this executable as an external tool without incorporating or modifying its source code.

---

### ENT
This product includes ENT (by John Walker, Fourmilab).  
ENT is released into the public domain.  
The source code for the ENT executable is provided unmodified in this package under `third_party/src/ent/`, and the executable was built from these original sources.  
Our software uses ENT by calling its executable externally, without any alterations to its source.

---

### Toeplitz Extractor
This product includes the Toeplitz extractor implementation (by Jozef Stefan Institute, Ljubljana, Slovenia), licensed under the MIT License.  
The source code for the Toeplitz extractor is included unmodified in this package under `third_party/src/toeplitz_extractor/`, and the executable was created from the original source.  
Our software calls the Toeplitz extractor externally and does not modify its original code.

---

### Cygwin
This product includes Cygwin DLLs.  
The Cygwin distribution contains software under several licenses: many tools are covered by the GNU GPL, some parts are public domain, and others use an X11/MIT-style license. The Cygwin website explicitly states this mix.  
The Cygwin DLLs included in this package are used unmodified, and our software simply calls the Cygwin tools as external processes without altering their original distributed code.
